# MSBuild Structured Log / BinlogMcp

MSBuild Structured Log Viewer records, reads, searches, and analyzes MSBuild .binlog files.

BinlogMcp exposes MSBuild .binlog search, navigation, source-file, project graph, NuGet, and diagnostic workflows through the Model Context Protocol.

Primary docs:
- https://msbuildlog.com/
- https://msbuildlog.com/binlogmcp/
- https://msbuildlog.com/binlogmcp/LlmGuide.md
- https://msbuildlog.com/binlogmcp/SearchSyntax.md

Source:
- https://github.com/KirillOsenkov/MSBuildStructuredLog
- https://github.com/KirillOsenkov/MSBuildStructuredLog/tree/main/src/BinlogMcp
